App.title: Agency Command Center
App.description: Internal AI-assisted operating system for the agency — clients, projects, tasks, and sales handover.

clients.title: No clients yet
clients.description: Add your first client to start creating projects and assigning tasks to the team.

projects.title: No projects
projects.description: Create your first project from the relevant client and specify the services provided.

tasks.title: No tasks in this view
tasks.description: Change the filter or add a new task to show it here.

handovers.title: No handover forms
handovers.description: Sales handover forms appear here as soon as they are submitted and automatically convert to projects.

notifications.title: No new notifications
notifications.description: Signals, handovers, and task updates will show up here.

aiInsights.title: No insights yet
aiInsights.description: As the system is used, events will accumulate and useful insights will appear in this panel.

serviceCategories.title: No categories yet
serviceCategories.description: Add a category or import Odoo categories to display linked task templates here.

renewalCycles.title: No renewal cycles
renewalCycles.description: Set the renewal schedule then start a new cycle to auto-generate tasks.

escalations.title: No escalations
escalations.description: Escalations directed to you will appear here automatically when an SLA is breached.

exceptions.title: No exceptions
exceptions.description: Open an exception manually from the task page when the situation calls for it.

NotFound.title: Page not found
NotFound.description: The link you followed doesn't match any page in the system.

FeatureFlags.pageDescription: Control new modules and routes before rolling them out to everyone. Changes take effect within one second on the next request.
FeatureFlags.helpRoles: Leave the list empty to enable the flag for everyone who qualifies, or specify roles to restrict it.
FeatureFlags.emptyDescription: Flags will appear here as new switchable modules are added.
FeatureFlags.errorDescription: An error occurred reading flags from the database. Refresh the page; if the error persists contact the system administrator.

Organization.head: Department head
Organization.chartEmptyDescription: Start by assigning department heads and team leads to display the full tree.
Organization.chartErrorDescription: An error occurred reading departments and employees. Refresh the page; if the error persists contact the system administrator.
Organization.salesGatedDescription: Enable the sales_track_enabled feature flag to show the Sales and Telesales department in the chart.
Organization.pickTeamLead: Choose a team lead to add…
Organization.mustHavePerm: Editing the org structure requires the 'Edit agency structure' permission.
Organization.chartDescription: Full agency tree: departments, heads, team leads, and members.

Escalations.pageDescription: Inbox for escalations directed to you. Track open exceptions and acknowledge or close them.
Escalations.noEscalationsDescription: Escalations directed to you will appear here automatically when an SLA is breached.

NotificationsPage.title: Notifications
NotificationsPage.description: All signals, handovers, and task updates in one place. Click any notification to open it and mark it as read.

Dashboard.welcomeDescription: Executive summary for the agency. Four key indicators, then what needs your attention right now.

commercialMix.title: Revenue mix this month
commercialMix.description: Contract distribution by movement type (New · Renew · Upsell · WinBack · Hold).

exceptions.title: Exceptions & escalations
exceptions.emptyDescription: The log is clean — keep up the pace.

handovers.title: Recent handovers
handovers.emptyDescription: Send your first handover from the sales page.

activity.title: Recent important events
activity.descriptionWith: Handovers, contracts, escalations, and decisions — filtered to what needs your attention
activity.descriptionEmpty: Handovers, contracts, escalations, and decisions will show up here
activity.emptyDescription: Once the first handover, contract, or escalation is logged, it will show up here.

Login.subtitle: Sign in to the command center

Notifications.title: Notifications
Notifications.minutesAgo: {n, plural, one {1 minute ago} other {# minutes ago}}
Notifications.hoursAgo: {n, plural, one {1 hour ago} other {# hours ago}}
Notifications.daysAgo: {n, plural, one {1 day ago} other {# days ago}}

ComingSoon.title: Under construction — coming soon
ComingSoon.description: This module is part of the development plan. The foundation is ready in the database and roadmap; it will activate at its scheduled phase.

Errors.boundaryDescription: Sorry about that. Try refreshing the page; if the error persists contact the system administrator.

CommandPalette.title: Command palette
CommandPalette.description: Search the system or type a command. Press Enter to open, Esc to close.

PageTitles.dashboardSubtitle: Executive dashboard focused on the most important signals right now
PageTitles.uploadsSubtitle: Tasks due before deadline, ordered by upload time

PageTitles.handoverSubtitle: Convert closed deals to projects and notify the account manager

PageTitles.projectsSubtitle: Track projects, services, and the delivery team
PageTitles.tasksSubtitle: All team tasks with status and priority
PageTitles.taskTemplatesSubtitle: Define the default workflow for each service
PageTitles.serviceCategoriesSubtitle: Manage service packages and their templates
PageTitles.contractsSubtitle: Commercial contracts, payments, and monthly follow-up cycles
PageTitles.projectsNewSubtitle: Pick the client and services; tasks appear in the preview panel
PageTitles.organizationChartSubtitle: Full tree: departments, heads, team leads, members
PageTitles.featureFlagsSubtitle: Manage new modules and routes before rollout
PageTitles.escalationsSubtitle: Inbox of escalations directed to you and open exceptions
PageTitles.governanceSubtitle: Tasks without an owner or recent notes — the five governance rules
